name: Hip MRI
description: MRI of the hip for evaluation of acetabular labrum, femoral head, and joint pathology

findings.technique: MRI of the hip was performed in multiple planes including T1, T2, PD, and STIR sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Acetabular Labrum
sections.content: The acetabular labrum is [intact / no tear / no degeneration]. The labral attachment is [intact / normal].

sections.name: Femoral Head
sections.content: The femoral head demonstrates [spherical contour / no flattening / no collapse]. The articular cartilage is [intact / no defect].

sections.name: Acetabular Cartilage
sections.content: The acetabular articular cartilage demonstrates [normal thickness / no defect / no fibrillation].

sections.name: Femoral Neck
sections.content: The femoral neck is [intact / no fracture / no stress reaction]. No bone marrow edema.

sections.name: Joint Space
sections.content: The joint space is [preserved / normal width / no narrowing]. No effusion.

sections.name: Ligamentum Teres
sections.content: The ligamentum teres is [intact / no tear / no hypertrophy].

sections.name: Iliopsoas Tendon
sections.content: The iliopsoas tendon is [intact / no tearing / normal course]. No iliopsoas bursitis.

sections.name: Bone Marrow
sections.content: The bone marrow demonstrates [normal signal / no edema / no necrosis]. No AVN.

impression:
1. Normal hip MRI.
2. No labral tear, cartilage defect, or avascular necrosis identified.
author: RadReport Templates
